evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of dual-sided rewards, where both the referrer and referee receive rewards. However, the evidence only confirms that the referrer (Sarah) receives a $25 account credit, while the referee (the friend who booked) receives a 20% discount on their first visit. This does not constitute a dual-sided reward as it does not confirm that both parties receive a reward of the same type or value, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: The evidence does not confirm that both the referrer and referee receive equivalent rewards.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
